restaurantInfo.name: Fresh Fuel Poke
restaurantInfo.tagline: Bright bowls, clean ingredients, and feel-good energy from lunch through late dinner.
restaurantInfo.shortTagline: Fresh bowls for quick lunches, date nights, and easy group orders.
restaurantInfo.story: Fresh Fuel Poke was born from a simple idea that fast food does not have to be junk food. We saw a world of people on the go, striving to be their best but lacking access to meals that were both convenient and genuinely nourishing. We bridge that gap by bringing the vibrant, fresh flavor of the Pacific to the heart of the city, offering a fuel stop for modern life. Our aim is to make vibrant, nutrient-dense food the most accessible, appealing, and exciting choice for modern, active lifestyles.
restaurantInfo.storyImage1Description: Ingredients are carefully weighed to guarantee perfect nutritional balance.
restaurantInfo.storyImage2Description: Sized and sliced with intention to deliver the ultimate texture in every bite.
restaurantInfo.storyImage3Description: Preserved and stored in optimal conditions so every bowl stays crisp and bold.
restaurantInfo.addressLine: G/F, 19 Amoy Street, Wanchai, Hong Kong
restaurantInfo.serviceHeaderDescription: Fresh Fuel poke is more than poke—it's functional foods are real energy. We provide dine-in service and takeaway service in our restaurants. We built our bowls around human nutrient needs, using fresh, healthy ingredients for better energy every day. After months of research and careful pairing, we got each bowl with unique purpose—shown clearly on the bowl label.
restaurantInfo.serviceDineInDescription:
Enjoy a comfortable dine-in experience with freshly prepared meals, attentive service, and a welcoming atmosphere. Browse our menu, reserve a table, and visit us for lunch or dinner. Our staff will serve you in a very hospitable environment.

Please call or whatsapp us prior to your arrival for general booking to serve you at our best.
restaurantInfo.serviceTakeAwayDescription: We offers fresh, customizable poke bowls with convenient delivery and pickup options. Customers can order online, or call us via directly or message on Whatsapp and choose from a variety of proteins, toppings, and sauces, and enjoy healthy Asian-inspired meals prepared for takeaway.

testimonials.quote: The bowls feel fresh and generous without being heavy. It is the kind of place you can revisit every week.
testimonials.name: Mia L.

testimonials.quote: Great for quick dinners and group orders. The flavors stay bright even when we order delivery.
testimonials.name: Arjun K.

testimonials.quote: Clean food, strong portions, and a menu that actually feels considered. We keep coming back for Bliss.
testimonials.name: Sophie W.

heroSlides.label: Signature Dishes
heroSlides.description: Our most-loved bowls, built to order with vibrant toppings and house sauces.

heroSlides.label: Fresh energy
heroSlides.description: Crisp veg, clean proteins, and bright sauces prepped fast so your bowl stays bold.

heroSlides.label: Fresh prep
heroSlides.description: Color, crunch, and balance from simple ingredients that still feel generous.
